projects.title: CertChain
projects.description: CertChain is a decentralized platform that improves digital asset transparency and security using blockchain technology with a Next.js frontend and NestJS backend services.
projects.overview: CertChain enables users to manage and verify digital assets securely through a blockchain-powered workflow. I built and integrated the frontend and backend layers to support wallet interactions, verification flows, and transaction history with strong focus on usability and reliability.

challenges.title: Smart Contract Security
challenges.solution: Implemented audited contract patterns and security checks to reduce attack surface and improve trust in transaction execution.

challenges.title: Scalability And Cost
challenges.solution: Optimized on-chain operations and reduced unnecessary calls to improve speed and reduce gas usage.

achievements: Delivered a secure blockchain workflow with a production-ready UI
Improved transaction performance through API and request optimization
Built a clear user flow for wallet and transaction management

projects.title: WoodCraft
projects.description: WoodCraft is a full-featured e-commerce platform with product browsing, cart flows, secure checkout, and inventory management for modern online retail.
projects.overview: WoodCraft delivers an end-to-end commerce experience including catalog exploration, checkout, order tracking, and admin inventory workflows. I worked on both frontend and backend modules to ensure strong UX and reliable transaction processing.

challenges.title: Payment Security
challenges.solution: Integrated Stripe with secure server-side validation and robust error handling to protect user payments.

challenges.title: Inventory Consistency
challenges.solution: Implemented real-time stock updates and backend checks to prevent overselling during high traffic.

challenges.title: Scalable Feature Growth
challenges.solution: Organized core business logic into maintainable modules for easier extension and long-term support.

achievements: Built checkout and order workflows for a complete shopping cycle
Improved mobile usability with responsive product and cart interfaces
Delivered admin features for product and inventory control

projects.title: Booksville Frontend
projects.description: Booksville is a web app for book lovers to discover, buy, rent, and review books while connecting with others. Built with Vue 3 and Vite.
projects.overview: Booksville is a comprehensive web application for book enthusiasts, offering features for discovering, purchasing, renting, and reviewing books while building a community. The frontend is built with Vue 3 and Vite, delivering a responsive and intuitive user experience.

challenges.title: Complex User Interface
challenges.solution: Implemented component-based architecture and state management for seamless user interactions.

challenges.title: Performance Optimization
challenges.solution: Utilized Vite build optimization and lazy loading for improved page load times.

features.title: Advanced Search
features.description: Powerful search functionality with filters and recommendations.

features.title: Social Features
features.description: User reviews, ratings, friend connections, and reading progress tracking.

features.title: E-commerce Integration
features.description: Complete shopping experience with wishlist and order management.

achievements: Successfully implemented responsive design across device sizes.
